blockedReason: Execution policy rejected sending local in-development product observations and screenshots to an external DeepSeek API.

trustSignals.notes: No DeepSeek review result was generated or counted.

issues.title: DeepSeek final review blocked by external disclosure policy
issues.evidence: DeepSeek API review would disclose local in-development app observations to an external service and was rejected by execution policy.
issues.suggestedDirection: Run DeepSeek final review only after explicit approval for external disclosure, or provide a local/private DeepSeek-compatible endpoint.
